entities.name: Air Operations Center
entities.description: Primary command and control node for coordinating all air operations within the area of responsibility.

entities.name: Intelligence Fusion Cell
entities.description: Aggregates and processes intelligence from multiple sources to support situational awareness.

entities.name: Situational Picture
entities.description: A unified common operating picture of the battlespace derived from multiple sensor feeds.

entities.name: Target Identification
entities.description: Process of identifying and classifying potential targets using available intelligence and sensor data.

entities.name: Strike Package
entities.description: A coordinated group of aircraft and supporting assets assigned to execute a strike mission.

entities.name: ISR Asset
entities.description: Intelligence, Surveillance, and Reconnaissance asset providing persistent wide-area coverage.

entities.name: Comms Relay Node
entities.description: Provides satellite and line-of-sight communications relay capability.

entities.name: Operational Command
entities.description: The authority and responsibility for directing assigned forces to accomplish military objectives.

entities.name: Air Defence Network
entities.description: Integrated network of sensors, command nodes, and weapon systems for air defence.

entities.name: Sensor Data Link
entities.description: High-bandwidth data link connecting airborne sensors to ground processing stations.

relationships.name: Provides Intelligence To
relationships.description: Intelligence Fusion Cell feeds processed intelligence data to the Air Operations Center.

relationships.name: Generates
relationships.description: The Air Operations Center generates and maintains the situational picture.

relationships.name: Supports
relationships.description: Situational Picture supports Target Identification activities.

relationships.name: Executes
relationships.description: Strike Package executes missions based on target identification outputs.

relationships.name: Collects For
relationships.description: ISR Asset collects raw intelligence for the Intelligence Fusion Cell.

relationships.name: Routes Through
relationships.description: Sensor data is routed through the Communications Relay Node.

relationships.name: Commands
relationships.description: Air Operations Center commands Strike Package during mission execution.

relationships.name: Integrates With
relationships.description: Air Defence Network integrates with Air Operations Center for shared picture.

relationships.name: Carries
relationships.description: The Sensor Data Link carries raw sensor feeds from ISR Assets.

relationships.name: Enables
relationships.description: Operational Command capability enables the Air Operations Center mandate.
